debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω) (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)

failed_attempts:
have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  refine ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_
  intro x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top.mp (by aesop) ω
  specialize hl
  simp_rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hl
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hl x
  have hmono := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono.mp (by aesop) ω
  have hstop := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.isStoppingTime N
  have hprop := hX.stoppedProcess N ω x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hprop
  refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
  rw [stoppedProcess] at hl
  simp_rw [Set.indicator_apply] at hl
  by_cases hω : ⊥ < hX.localSeq N ω
  · have hseq := hmono N (N + 1) (by linarith)
    have hle := hN (N + 1) (by linarith)
    rw [WithTop.lt_def] at hω
    rw [WithTop.lt_def] at hle
    simp_all
  · exfalso
    simp_all

have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := h 0 ω x
  use l
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le _ _ hω.1] at hl
  simpa [Set.indicator_of_mem] using hl

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX.stoppedProcess 0 ω x
  use l
  have h₀ : ⊥ < hX.localSeq 0 ω := by
    specialize hω 0
    simp only [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hω x
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (hN 0 le_rfl) (iInf_le _ 0)
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le h₀, Set.indicator_of_mem h₀] at hl
  exact hl

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  have h' := hτX 0 ω
  simp only [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_apply] at h'
  by_cases h : ⊥ < τ 0 ω
  · specialize h' x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := h'
    use l
    have h1 : τ 0 ω = ⊤ := by
      contrapose! hω
      exact not_tendsto_atTop_of_bounded' hω
    simp_all [h1]
  · exfalso
    have h1 : τ 0 ω = ⊥ := le_antisymm (bot_le) (not_lt.mp h)
    have h2 : (τ · ω) 0 = ⊥ := h1
    have h3 : ¬Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := by
      simp_all [tendsto_atTop_atTop_iff]
    exact hω h3

have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX.stoppedProcess 0 ω x

  have hτ := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono

have h := hX.stoppedProcess
  refine ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_
  intro x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top.mp (by aesop) ω
  have hmono := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.mono.mp (by aesop) ω
  have hstop := hX.IsLocalizingSequence.isStoppingTime

  cases' lt_or_ge (hX.localSeq 0 ω) x with hlt hge
  · obtain ⟨l', hl'⟩ := hprop x
    use l'
    rw [nhdsWithin_Iio_eq_nhdsWithin_Iio_of_lt hlt] at hl'

    use X x ω
    apply Tendsto.congr'

      specialize hN 0 (by norm_num)
      contrapose! hN
      exact le_of_not_gt hN
    · simp [stoppedProcess, Set.indicator_apply, hge]
